name: Antwaney Jamilia Tinsely
reason: “DO NOT RENT‼️This client was brokered through PG1.247exotics as a repeat/VIP client. This client wanted a Urus for 3 days and ended up using a fake license to rent. His insurance that he used was a valid policy with transferable coverage. I told the client to bring a second form of verification and he used a picture of a social security number with his name. PG1.247exotics kept vouching for this client despite him using identity fraud and he became extremely aggravated. It was a late night deal and they wanted me to leave the urus and said they’d handle the verification and said they can handle it. After saying I wouldn’t rent to him, he reached out to another broker who then got him a urus using his girls DL and Insurance. From what I was told, he ended up taking the URUS up to Orland and was driving it with a FAKE DL. Please be careful and NEVER let someone else handle a deal for you unless you 1000% trust them. ALWAYS verify the license to make sure it’s valid.”
